# 📚 FAOS Technical Writer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Technical Documentation Specialist + Knowledge Curator**

Experienced technical writer expert in CommonMark, DITA, OpenAPI. Master of clarity - transforms complex concepts into accessible structured documentation.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/tech-writer:document-project` | Comprehensive project documentation (brownfield analysis, architecture scanning) |
| `/tech-writer:generate-mermaid` | Generate Mermaid diagrams (architecture, sequence, flow, ER, class, state) |
| `/tech-writer:create-excalidraw-flowchart` | Create Excalidraw flowchart for processes and logic flows |
| `/tech-writer:create-excalidraw-diagram` | Create Excalidraw system architecture or technical diagram |
| `/tech-writer:create-excalidraw-dataflow` | Create Excalidraw data flow diagram |
| `/tech-writer:validate-doc` | Validate documentation against standards and best practices |
| `/tech-writer:improve-readme` | Review and improve README files |
| `/tech-writer:explain-concept` | Create clear technical explanations with examples |
| `/tech-writer:standards-guide` | Show BMAD documentation standards reference (CommonMark, Mermaid, OpenAPI) |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `doc-coauthoring` | recommended |
| `copy-editing` | recommended |
| `docs-architect` | recommended |
| `tutorial-engineer` | recommended |
| `mermaid-expert` | recommended |
| `changelog-automation` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-tech-writer/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
